summary.zh: 比较常用缓动曲线和自定义贝塞尔曲线的速度变化。
summary.en: Compare common easing curves and custom cubic-bezier velocity profiles.

definition.zh: 动画加速或减速的速率变化方式。
definition.en: An easing function maps linear timeline progress to a changing rate of property interpolation.

description.zh: 演示使用较长时长以便观察完整变化；生产界面的即时反馈应收敛到 300ms 内。
description.en: Uses a longer demo duration so the full change stays observable; immediate production UI feedback should stay under 300ms.

description.zh: 控制元素移动的空间距离。
description.en: Controls how far the element travels.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 比较速度曲线，帮助为响应动作、屏幕内移动和持续运动选择合适节奏。
purpose.en: Compare velocity curves to choose an appropriate rhythm for responses, on-screen travel, and continuous motion.

frequency.zh: 每种交互模式在定稿前校准一次，设计系统内复用已批准曲线。
frequency.en: Calibrate each interaction pattern before release and reuse approved curves through the design system.

trigger.zh: 由曲线选择或预览重播触发，所有选项共享相同距离和时长。
trigger.en: Trigger from curve selection or replay with equal travel and duration across options.

enterExit.zh: 响应用户的进入动作使用强缓出，屏幕内 A 到 B 移动使用缓入缓出。
enterExit.en: Use strong ease-out for user-triggered entrances and ease-in-out for on-screen A-to-B movement.

interruptibility.zh: 目标变化时从当前速度衔接；CSS transition 的中断效果需要真实操作验证。
interruptibility.en: Carry current velocity into target changes and test interrupted CSS transitions through real interaction.

gestureRules.zh: 参数控件支持键盘步进，曲线图与运动结果同步更新。
gestureRules.en: Support keyboard steps in controls and update the curve graph with the motion result.

reducedMotion.zh: 保留极短状态过渡，移除明显加速、减速和长距离运动。
reducedMotion.en: Keep very short state transitions and remove pronounced acceleration, deceleration, and long travel.

reviewNotes.zh: 避免将 ease-in 用于即时 UI 响应。
reviewNotes.en: Avoid ease-in for immediate UI response.

reviewNotes.zh: 线性曲线只用于旋转器、跑马灯等恒速运动。
reviewNotes.en: Reserve linear curves for constant-speed motion such as spinners and marquees.
